mappings.rationale: Directly covers the intersection of military affairs and technology, including weapons, platforms, and logistics.
Directly covers nuclear weapons including fission, fusion, blast, heat, and radioactive fallout effects.
Covers modern military technology and warfare methods including missiles, electronics, and air power.
Covers early hand-powered weapons including shock weapons, missile weapons, and mechanical weapons of the ancient world.
Relevant to the strategic use of military technology, weapon platforms, and logistics covered in this section.
Directly covers military aircraft as weapon platforms, including fighters, bombers, and helicopters.
Covers the historical development of military technology from early firearms to modern weapons systems.
Covers naval weapon platforms including surface ships, submarines, and aircraft carriers.
Covers military technology of WWI including early tanks, artillery, chemical weapons, and aircraft.
Covers WWII military technology including nuclear weapons, jet aircraft, rockets, and radar.
Relevant to the use of explosives, small arms, and unconventional military technology.
Relevant to nuclear-powered weapon platforms including aircraft carriers, cruisers, and submarines.
Covers the nuclear physics underlying fission and fusion weapons.
Relevant to military electronics, signal security, and encryption/decryption techniques used in military communications.
Covers the military technology of the gunpowder era including artillery, small arms, and fortification.
Covers the technological arms race including nuclear weapons, ballistic missiles, and strategic defense systems.
Relevant to the strategic and tactical use of military technology and the theory of warfare.
Relevant to missile defense systems, nuclear deterrence, and the security implications of military technology.
Relevant to the use of military technology in internal conflicts and asymmetric warfare.
Relevant to the legal frameworks governing the use of military technology including chemical and biological weapons.
Relevant to modern military technology including autonomous weapons systems and unmanned platforms.
